Subject: Request to Extend Contract-Review Deadline

Dear [Opposing Counsel],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request a brief extension of our current deadline for completing the contract review. Due to scheduling constraints on our end, an additional seven business days would allow us to provide a more thorough and considered response.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether a one-week extension is workable, and I am happy to discuss any concerns or alternative timelines. Thank you for your understanding and flexibility.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
